description_long: This object is a single slice of brown, whole grain bread with a slightly irregular, rounded shape and a gently domed surface. The crust is darker and runs along the edge, appearing slightly rough and uneven, with some small notches and indentations. The interior is porous and airy, with visible small holes and a fibrous, spongy texture typical of whole wheat or multigrain bread. The coloration ranges from a medium tan to a deeper brown at the crust, with subtle variations in shade across the surface. The slice is relatively thin, with a consistent thickness throughout, and the edges are not perfectly straight, giving it a natural, hand-cut appearance. There are no visible seeds, toppings, or branding, and the bread appears unadorned and unpackaged.
description: A single, irregularly shaped slice of brown whole grain bread with a rough, dark crust and a porous, airy interior. The surface is matte and fibrous, with no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: This view shows the top surface of the bread slice, highlighting its rounded, irregular shape and the porous, fibrous texture of the interior.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the thinness of the slice and the rough, darker crust running along the edge.
description_view_2: This angled view displays the uneven edge and the airy, hole-filled interior, with the crust visible along the bottom.
description_view_3: This view presents the opposite side, showing the full length of the crust and the consistent, porous texture of the bread's surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is uneven and slightly rough, with a darker brown coloration and small notches along the edge. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring.
